items.title: England’s 1am kick-off vs Mexico STILL in doubt with Fifa chiefs set to meet today amid forecasts of thunderstorms
items.summary: FIFA chiefs are set to meet with local organisers in Mexico City today as England’s World Cup 1am kick-off against Mexico remains under threat from thunderstorms. The Three Lions are due to face the co-hosts at the Azteca Stadium in the last 16 in a brutal early kick-off for UK-based fans on Monday
